codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior blocking issue from timeline-view by tightening source-path detection to require at least one directory separator and a whitelisted extension, and adds targeted regression tests for both negative and positive cases.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The app-worker skill procedure is too rigid for non-UI app fixes: it marks runs as procedure deviations when agent-browser is skipped even if the change is purely utility/test logic.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature handoff for fix-timeline-source-path-regex sets skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false due skipping app-worker step 6. SKILL.md step 6 currently prescribes manual browser verification as a required step.

summary: Reviewed fix-timeline-source-path-regex against both the original timeline-view diff and the fix diff; the regex overmatch defect is corrected and regression coverage now prevents dotted non-path false positives like Node.js and v2.0 while preserving valid source-path detection.
